name: Pepper Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in an 8-inch skillet or frying pan.
2. Add chicken, salt, pepper, and a sprinkle of chili powder to the melted butter.
3. Cook the chicken until browned on both sides, then remove it to a plate.
4. Pour in the cream of mushroom soup and add teriyaki sauce and milk. Stir until the soup is smooth.
5. Season with more salt, pepper, and chili powder to taste.
6. If desired, add sliced mushrooms (fresh or canned) to the skillet.
7. Return the cooked chicken pieces to the skillet and stir gently until they are thoroughly warmed and coated in the sauce.
8. Add a little more milk if needed for the chicken to be fully covered.
9. Serve with rice, noodles, or mashed potatoes.
Preparation Time: Less than 25 minutes.
